commands.review_summary:
The PR stringifies requester-agent handoff thread IDs, accepts direct gateway agent delivery-evidence payloads, and adds a Telegram topic generated-video completion regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main can pass a numeric Telegram topic id into the gateway `agent` schema, which accepts only string `threadId` values. I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer review, CI/proof consideration, and merge decision.

target.title: Fix Telegram topic media completion delivery
target.body:
## Summary
- stringify Telegram/forum thread ids before requester-agent completion handoff calls the gateway `agent` method
- accept direct in-process gateway agent payloads as delivery evidence, not only wrapped `{ result }` responses
- add regression coverage for generated video completion in a Telegram topic with message-tool media evidence

## Runtime evidence
- Before this change, task `4a0f1eac-d323-431c-b36d-38682650c4b8` generated a video with `xai/grok-imagine-video`, but completion delivery failed with `invalid agent params: at /threadId: must be string`.
- After applying the fix locally and restarting the gateway, task `3c71c210-5cf0-4ad9-ace4-82c73b04eab4` generated `video-1---c6d8cbae-12e1-452b-b9f4-9b3c7fe631aa.mp4` with `xai/grok-imagine-video`.
- Telegram delivery succeeded at `2026-05-18 04:09 MDT`: `telegram outbound send ok accountId=default chatId=-1003970070733 messageId=138 operation=sendVideo deliveryKind=video`.
- The generated file probed as valid H.264 video, 1280x720, 5.041667s, 5,902,659 bytes.
- User-provided Telegram screenshot shows the video rendered in the topic with the expected caption at 04:09.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts -t "stringifies Telegram topic ids for generated video completion handoff"`
- `pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-route.test.ts src/channels/conversation-resolution.test.ts src/channels/message/send.test.ts src/gateway/protocol/schema/agent.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`

## Known unrelated current-main failure
- `pnpm test src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts` still fails one existing expectation, `requires message-tool delivery for channel subagent completions`; the same targeted test also fails on clean `main`.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
